QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: displayPresetsTabFirst
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Display the presets tab at start
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Display the presets tab at start

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: showMissionItemStatus
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Show/Hide the mission item status display
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Show/Hide the mission item status display

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: takeoffItemNotRequired
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Allow missions to not require a takeoff item
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Missions do not require takeoff item

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: allowMultipleLandingPatterns
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Allow configuring multiple landing sequences if the firmware supports it. The first one will be used for the mission, but in the event of an RTL, the one that is closest will be used instead.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Allow configuring multiple landing sequences

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: showGimbalOnlyWhenSet
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Show gimbal yaw visual only when set explicitly for the waypoint
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Show gimbal yaw visual only when set explicitly for the waypoint

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: vtolTransitionDistance
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Amount of distance required for vehicle to complete a transition
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: VTOL Transition Distance
